title: Lifestyle | The Guardian
summary: Lifestyle Lifestyle Lifestyle The pet I’ll never forget: Benny the cat, who climbed into my shopping bag – then shared my bathsI found Benny and his brother, Buster, when they were three months old. I was besotted with them both, but it was Benny, with his quirky ways and loving nature, who really stole my heart4m agoThe emotional security secret: how to get healthier, happier and have stronger
